input.headline: Dick Cheney funeral: George W. Bush delivers eulogy

raw.headline: Dick Cheney funeral: George W. Bush delivers eulogy

winner: During the eulogy, George W. Bush stood at the podium and said, 'Dick, I always knew you were a great shot.' The crowd chuckled nervously as he pulled out his concealed Taser.

candidates.text: George W. Bush said, "Dick, you were always a bit of a chameleon—today, you're in a casket.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Puns on 'chameleon' and 'casket' are clever and specific, leveraging the context of the funeral with a touch of dark humor."}

candidates.text: At the funeral, George W. Bush mentioned how Dick Cheney's love for power was unmatched. Then he quietly added, "But then again, so was his love for oxygen.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a darkly humorous punchline that ties back to Cheney's health issues, concise and specific."}

candidates.text: George W. Bush gave a eulogy so moving that Dick Cheney’s ghost finally asked for a refund.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with ghost and refund, specific to the characters involved, concise and funny."}

candidates.text: George W. Bush gave such a heartfelt eulogy at Dick Cheney's funeral that he accidentally took out his own life insurance policy in gratitude.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the humor feels a bit forced and relies on a weak punchline that doesn't fully land."}

candidates.text: During the eulogy, George W. Bush stood at the podium and said, 'Dick, I always knew you were a great shot.' The crowd chuckled nervously as he pulled out his concealed Taser.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has some surprise and specificity with the Taser reference, but it's somewhat generic and relies on a tired political punchline. The humor is mild and not particularly original."}
